case_title: SAN MATEO CREDIT UNION VS. ISAAC FAALOGOIFO ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-28-2017 CONTINUED TO MAY-09-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE FEB-28-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN MATEO CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAALOGOIFO, ISAAC $8,655.32 PRINCIPAL, $567.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $531.76 INTEREST, $376.60 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,130.68, SEE SCANNED DOC
